feed.title: Current Watches, Warnings and Advisories for New Zealand issued by MetService
feed.rights: Copyright Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited, 2026. Licensed under Creative Commons BY 4.0.

entry.title: Strong Wind Watch
entry.summary: Southwest winds may approach severe gale in exposed places. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain and thunderstorms possible from late afternoon. Rainfall accumulations may approach warning criteria, or possibly exceed criteria in localised spots due to thunderstorm activity. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Snow showers expected to develop about the summit around midnight, lowering to 400 metres early Saturday morning. Expect 1 to 3 cm of snow to accumulate.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Snow showers may affect the road early Saturday morning. 1 to 2cm could accumulate down to 800 metres.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Snow is expected to affect the road early Saturday morning and around 1cm may accumulate above 400 metres, particularly east of the Summit.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Snow lowers down to 500 metres through Saturday morning and early afternoon. 1 to 3cm could accumulate above 600 metres with lesser amounts lower down.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Snow is expected to affect the road Saturday morning and early afternoon. 3 to 5cm may accumulate above 600 metres with lesser amounts down to 400 metres.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Snow is expected to affect the road Friday night and early Saturday morning. 1 to 3 cm of snow may accumulate near the summit with lesser amounts down to 500 metres.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Snow showers are expected to affect the road above 300 metres early Saturday morning. Up to 1cm of snow may accumulate on the road near the summit.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Periods of snow are expected until about midnight tonight. Expect 5 to 10 cm of snow to accumulate near the summit, especially late afternoon and this evening. About 2 to 5 cm of snow is possible at 600 metres with lesser amounts down to 500 metres.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited
